column1: **cellpert_nts:** |br| Number of time steps after which perturbations are seeded
**cellpert_sw2b:** |br| Only south and west bnds perturbed (for idealized cases): |br| 0=off |br| 1=south & west |br| 2=south |br| *C-O if cellpertSelector > 0*
**cellpert_amp:** |br| Maximum amplitude for the potential temperature perturbations |br| *C-O if cellpertSelector > 0*
**cellpert_gppc:** |br| Number of grid points conforming the cell |br| *C-O if cellpertSelector > 0*
**cellpert_ndbc:** |br| Number of cells normal to domain lateral boundaries |br| *C-O if cellpertSelector > 0*
**cellpert_kbottom:** |br| Z-grid point where the perturbations start |br| *C-O if cellpertSelector > 0*
**cellpert_ktop:** |br| Z-grid point where the perturbations end |br| *C-O if cellpertSelector > 0*
**cellpert_tvcp:** |br| Time-varying CP method selector: |br| 0=off; 1=on (hydroBCs==1) |br| *C-O if cellpertSelector > 0*
**cellpert_eckert:** |br| Eckert number for the potential temperature perturbations (hydroBCs==1) |br| *C-O if cellpertSelector > 0*
**cellpert_tsfact:** |br| Factor on the refreshing perturbation time scale (hydroBCs==1) |br| *C-O if cellpertSelector > 0*
